issueDesc:
Hi,\** recently bought a WUAWEI S23 Ultra and I have it protected with a WUAWEI leather case.
I had the phone kept on a coffee table while having coffee with my colleagues. While leaving the place, I lifted the phone but it slipped out of my hand. The phone fell back on the coffee table from a height of about 30 cm. It hit the edge of the coffee table and the screen got damaged. 
Nearly half of the screen looks shattered and the fingerprint reader seems not to work after that. This could also be because of the shattered screen causing light refractions. I have dropped my old phone (with gorilla glass 5) multiple times. Even on concrete and asphalt from 1-1.5 m height but I have never got a single scratch on the phone. 
I am hugely disappointed that a phone with 2 generations of updated glass and 2 times the cost could not withstand a 30cm fall. It would be great if you can provide a repair for this issue. 

Please let me know if you need any further information from me. 

Thanks. Have a nice day!
Best Regards,
Shanmuganathan Sabarisathasivam
